title: Negative/edge/exception test pack — batch 1 (cross-cutting): status matrix + CSV-injection proof + body-size limit
business_reason: Execute the negative/edge/exception test pack (versa_olympiads_negative_edge_exception_test_cases.md, 340 cases). Classify every case against the actual controls, verify the strong ones, and fix the real gaps one by one. Batch 1 covers the cross-cutting (GLOBAL/DB/SEC/WORKER/DRIFT) set.

design.matrix: reports/NEGATIVE_TEST_STATUS.md — all 340 IDs classified pass/partial/gap/manual with evidence + a prioritized gap backlog. Most map to already-built controls (maker-checker, append-only+hash-chained audit, drift/login scans, server-calculated amounts, kernel scope/masking, signed-URL expiry, idempotency).
design.csv_injection: verified SEC-011 / WF-011-NEG-014 — exporter.ts esc() already neutralizes =,+,-,@,tab,CR; added unit test tests/unit/negative_export_csv.test.ts.
design.body_size_gap: fixed GLOBAL-VALID-002 / GLOBAL-FILE-002 / WF-002-NEG-007 — NEW middleware.ts rejects oversized request bodies with 413 before the handler (1MB JSON cap, 15MB for upload/import/webhook paths).

param_14.question: Does the system fail safely on the negative/edge/exception cases, not just the happy path?
param_14.answer: A 340-case negative pack is now tracked in reports/NEGATIVE_TEST_STATUS.md: the security backbone (maker-checker, immutable+verified audit, drift/login scans, scope isolation, masking, idempotency, signed-URL expiry, CSV-injection neutralization) is built and largely test-proven; the genuine gaps are enumerated and fixed one by one. Batch 1 verified CSV-injection and closed the oversized-body gap (413 guard).
param_14.answer_source: negative test pack, exporter.ts, middleware.ts, NEGATIVE_TEST_STATUS.md
param_14.security_implications: bounds request memory + blocks payload-flood DoS (413); confirms spreadsheet formula-injection neutralization on exports; documents the residual gap backlog (last-super-admin, rate-limit, optimistic-lock, MIME allowlist, opt-out) for sequenced fixes.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: remaining gap backlog (see NEGATIVE_TEST_STATUS.md): last-super-admin guard, API rate limiting, universal optimistic locking, upload MIME allowlist, notification opt-out, dedicated UI-state QA pass.
